name: implement key-count CLI
prompt: Implement the key-count CLI per the feature spec (.tenet/spec/) and harness (.tenet/harness/current.md). Build it, write tests, run the tests, ensure they pass. Commit locally as 'tenet(key-count): initial implementation'. Deliverables: src/key-count.ts, tests/key-count.test.ts, tsconfig.json, package.json, dist/ after build.
